title: FINGOOO Artificial Red Berry Stems, 14 Pcs 7.8 Inch Glitter Christmas Tree Picks for Christmas Tree Ornaments,DIY Xmas Wreath, Holiday and Home Decoration
features: Package- 20 pieces glittery berry picks in sparkle red,enough quantity for you to decorate Christmas tree at holiday or make art craft for your kids, family and friends
Material- Glitter berries are made of foam balls and wire.Lightweight to hang on anywhere you like, the stem attached to the berry is easily bent and operated according to your needs
Suitable for DIY- Christmas floral stems for arrangements, DIY wreath design, indoor lanterns or baskets, add them to your tree for a rustic farmhouse look, the stem is wired for easy manipulation
Heavy glitter- berry picks are evenly dusted with bright powder,add a bit more red highlights to your Christmas tree,each berry' length is about 7.8inches/20cm

Wide application- ideal for Christmas tree and xmas wreath decorations,ball-flower making.Holiday, home, party,winter wedding Ornaments, These vivid red berry cuttings will add a festive atmosphere it can also be a lovely decorative gift for your mother, sister, colleagues or friends
description: Product Description Christmas tree and Xmas wreath decorations Holiday, home, party,winter wedding Ornaments These vivid silvery berry cuttings will add a festive atmosphere it can also be a lovely decorative gift for your mother, sister, colleagues or friends Easy to use Stem attached to the berry is easily bent and operated according to your needs Material Glitter berries are made of foam balls and wire.Lightweight to hang on anywhere you like Heavy glitter evenly dusted with bright powder,add a bit more silvery highlights to your Christmas tree.There are about 12 berry on each branch Decorate Christmas tree at holiday or make art craft for your kids, family and friends Suitable for DIY: Christmas floral stems for arrangements, DIY wreath design, indoor lanterns or baskets, add them to your tree for a rustic farmhouse look, the stem is wired for easy manipulation
